mood: Tropical modern resort — warm, inviting, contemporary luxury like a Tulum boutique hotel
designRules: LAYOUT: Hero with large rounded photo placeholder + overlapping search card on bottom-right corner. Features as flowing icon pills in flex-wrap layout (different widths). Steps in zig-zag pattern (odd left, even right) connected by curved dotted line. Testimonials with elevated center card. Blog cards with overlapping rounded photos.
CONVERSION: Facility pages use Layout Option C — top units as rounded peach-accented cards. Pill-shaped search card overlapping hero photo. Market pages show rounded facility cards.
Hero: rounded 24px photo placeholder with search card overlapping bottom-right corner
Features as flowing pill-shaped tags in flex-wrap layout — different widths per content length
Zig-zag step process: steps alternate left/right connected by curved dotted line
Testimonial cards with center card elevated/scaled 1.05x for focus
Blog cards on dark bg with photos that overflow 20px above card border

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-7 border border-surface shadow-elevated hover:shadow-lg transition-all">
designPatterns.button: <a className="bg-accent text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-warm hover:brightness-110 transition-all">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="border border-primary/20 text-primary font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-surface transition-all">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl text-text">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="bg-accent text-white text-sm font-semibold px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full border-2 border-surface rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-text-muted focus:border-accent transition" />
designPatterns.navStyle: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-surface
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-primary text-white text-sm font-medium">
